Monthly Video Generator bundled FFmpeg toolchain

source=OSXExperts.NET static macOS builds
source_page=https://www.osxexperts.net/
downloaded=2026-04-24

ffmpeg_arm64_version=ffmpeg version 8.1
ffmpeg_arm64_url=https://www.osxexperts.net/ffmpeg81arm.zip
ffmpeg_arm64_sha256=9a08d61f9328e8164ba560ee7a79958e357307fcfeea6fe626b7d66cdc287028
ffmpeg_x64_version=ffmpeg version 8.0
ffmpeg_x64_url=https://www.osxexperts.net/ffmpeg80intel.zip
ffmpeg_x64_sha256=df3f1e3facdc1ae0ad0bd898cdfb072fbc9641bf47b11f172844525a05db8d11
ffprobe_arm64_version=ffprobe version 8.1
ffprobe_arm64_url=https://www.osxexperts.net/ffprobe81arm.zip
ffprobe_arm64_sha256=aab17ac7379c1178aaf400c3ef36cdb67db0b75b1a23eeef2cb9f658be8844e6
ffprobe_x64_version=ffprobe version 8.0
ffprobe_x64_url=https://www.osxexperts.net/ffprobe80intel.zip
ffprobe_x64_sha256=5228e651e2bd67bb55819b27f6138351587b16d2b87446007bf35b7cf930d891

committed_ffmpeg_arm64=third_party/ffmpeg/darwin-arm64/ffmpeg
committed_ffmpeg_x64=third_party/ffmpeg/darwin-x64/ffmpeg
committed_ffprobe_arm64=third_party/ffmpeg/darwin-arm64/ffprobe
committed_ffprobe_x64=third_party/ffmpeg/darwin-x64/ffprobe

Verified required capabilities on 2026-04-24:
- filters: zscale, tonemap, xfade, acrossfade, overlay
- encoders: libx264, h264_videotoolbox, libx265, hevc_videotoolbox

Notes:
- The arm64 and x64 source builds differ by upstream availability: arm64 is
  FFmpeg/FFprobe 8.1 and x64 is FFmpeg/FFprobe 8.0.
- Packaging assembles universal app-resource binaries with lipo and ad-hoc
  signs the final tools during scripts/build_app.sh.
